ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each country */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the country is featured for special analysis */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Country population */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "library_sizes" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "total_library_size" INTEGER /* Total number of titles in the library */,
  "no_of_tv_shows" INTEGER /* Number of TV shows available */,
  "no_of_movies" INTEGER /* Number of movies available */,
  "content_quality" TEXT /* Quality of content (HD, Full HD, 4K) */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of new content updates (daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_plans" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan (Basic, Standard, Premium) */,
  "cost_per_month" REAL /* Monthly cost of the subscription plan in USD */,
  "no_of_screens" INTEGER /* Number of screens allowed per plan */,
  "hd_availability" INTEGER /* Availability of HD content in the plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "plan_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_analysis" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of subscription per country */,
  "cost_per_show" REAL /* Calculated cost per TV show based on subscription */,
  "cost_per_movie" REAL /* Calculated cost per movie based on subscription */,
  "revenue_per_user" REAL /* Average revenue generated per user */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin for the subscription model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., TV Show, Movie) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the content type (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the content type (e.g., Action - Adventure) */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_content" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the type of content */,
  "available_titles" INTEGER /* Number of titles available of the specified type */,
  "new_releases" INTEGER /* Number of new releases in the specified type */,
  "popular_titles" INTEGER /* Number of popular titles in the specified type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_engagement" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the type of content */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the content type */,
  "avg_watch_time" REAL /* Average watch time for the content type in minutes */,
  "user_ratings" REAL /* Average user ratings for the content type */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of user reviews for the content type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_strategies" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing strategy */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the strategy (0-100) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the marketing strategy */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the marketing strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "strategy_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for each feedback entry */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by users */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_reporting" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total views aggregated for all content types */,
  "total_engagement" INTEGER /* Total engagement score based on watch time and interactions */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated in the country */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the streaming service in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country code */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the users (e.g., 18-24, 25-34) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the users (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Number of users in the specified age group and gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code", "age_group", "gender")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_acquisition" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for each content item */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the type of content */,
  "acquisition_cost" REAL /* Cost of acquiring the content */,
  "acquisition_source" TEXT /* Source of the acquired content (e.g., Studio, Independent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_acquisition_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_catalog" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique ID for each content item */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID representing the type of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the content (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_catalog_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)
